summary: Completed testing of WaMerce 1688 Integration Platform - Iteration 12. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). New features verified: image_search_service.py module, fulfillment_webhooks.py with webhook endpoints (/api/webhooks/fulfillment/status-update, /dwz56, /1688, /test), whatsapp_notifications.py with notification endpoints (/api/notifications/whatsapp/send, /templates), and Widget1688Status.jsx dashboard widget.
critical_code_review_comments: image_search_service.py correctly implements: search_products_by_image, link_product_by_image, auto_link_products_by_image, get_product_link, get_all_product_links, extract_1688_id_from_sku
fulfillment_webhooks.py correctly implements webhook endpoints with proper Pydantic models (FulfillmentStatusUpdate, DWZ56WebhookPayload, Alibaba1688WebhookPayload)
whatsapp_notifications.py correctly implements wa.me fallback when WhatsApp Business API token is expired - returns success with wa_url
Widget1688Status.jsx correctly displays on dashboard with data-testid='widget-1688-status' and shows status pipeline (Pending, Ordered, Shipped, With DWZ, To Sync, Synced)
All webhook endpoints properly log to webhook_logs collection and process status updates
WhatsApp notification templates support both English (en) and Urdu (ur) languages
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing order_id '29533' for WhatsApp notification testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested. New services: image_search_service.py (product image search and linking), fulfillment_webhooks.py (webhook-based fulfillment sync from 1688/DWZ56), whatsapp_notifications.py (order notifications via WhatsApp). WhatsApp Business API token is EXPIRED but wa.me fallback works correctly. Widget1688Status.jsx displays on dashboard showing order pipeline status.

features_tested.1_image_search_service_module: PASS - /app/backend/services/image_search_service.py exists with all required functions
features_tested.5_webhook_test_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/webhooks/fulfillment/test works for all types (fulfillment, dwz56, 1688)
features_tested.7_whatsapp_templates_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/notifications/whatsapp/templates returns 5 template types in 2 languages
features_tested.8_whatsapp_send_notification: PASS - POST /api/notifications/whatsapp/send works with order_id 29533, returns wa_url
features_tested.9_whatsapp_send_urdu: PASS - Urdu language notifications work correctly
features_tested.13_widget_1688_status_visible: PASS - Widget visible on dashboard with data-testid='widget-1688-status'
features_tested.14_widget_status_pipeline: PASS - Shows Pending, Ordered, Shipped, With DWZ, To Sync, Synced counts
features_tested.15_widget_quick_actions: PASS - Bulk Order, Sync Fulfillment, Import Products buttons present

api_verification_summary.POST /api/webhooks/fulfillment/status-up: WORKING - Processes generic fulfillment status updates
api_verification_summary.POST /api/webhooks/fulfillment/dwz56: WORKING - Processes DWZ56 shipping status updates
api_verification_summary.POST /api/webhooks/fulfillment/test: WORKING - Creates test webhook payloads for all types
api_verification_summary.GET /api/webhooks/fulfillment/logs: WORKING - Returns webhook logs with filtering
api_verification_summary.GET /api/notifications/whatsapp/template: WORKING - Returns 5 templates (order_confirmed, order_shipped, order_delivered, order_1688_placed, order_in_transit) in en/ur
api_verification_summary.POST /api/notifications/whatsapp/send: WORKING - Sends notification, returns wa_url (API token expired, using wa.me fallback)
api_verification_summary.GET /api/notifications/whatsapp/logs: WORKING - Returns notification logs with filtering

elements_verified: Header: '1688 Orders Today - Quick overview of your supply chain'
Status pipeline: Pending (3), Ordered (0), Shipped (0), With DWZ (0), To Sync (0), Synced (0)
Quick action buttons: Bulk Order, Sync Fulfillment, Import Products
